models.name: dev_network_devices
models.description: Network device inventory and management system tracking IP addresses, MAC addresses, manufacturers, and device lifecycle information across different network sites and subnets

properties.description: Unique identifier for the network device record
IPv4 address assigned to the network device
Network subnet in CIDR notation (e.g., 192.168.1.0/24) that the device belongs to
Physical site or location identifier where the device is deployed (Unknown if not specified)
Media Access Control (MAC) address - unique hardware identifier for the network interface
Device manufacturer name (e.g., Microsoft Corporation, VMware Inc., AWS) based on MAC address OUI lookup
Timestamp when the device record was last updated or seen on the network
Network unit identifier for grouping or organizational purposes
Internal device identifier used by the network management system
Boolean flag indicating if the device record is considered stale or outdated (not recently seen)
Original timestamp when the device was first detected or created in the raw data collection system
Timestamp when the device record was first stored in the data warehouse
Timestamp when the device record was last updated in the data warehouse
UUID of the data processing job or batch that processed this device record

columns.name: is_cloud_device
columns.expression: CASE WHEN manufacturer IN ('AWS', 'Microsoft Corporation') OR ip LIKE '10.%' OR ip LIKE '172.%' OR ip LIKE '100.%' THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Calculated field indicating if device appears to be cloud-based (AWS, Azure, or private IP ranges)

columns.name: is_virtual_machine
columns.expression: CASE WHEN manufacturer LIKE '%VMware%' OR manufacturer LIKE '%Virtual%' THEN true ELSE false END

properties.description: Calculated field indicating if device is likely a virtual machine based on manufacturer

columns.name: subnet_class
columns.expression: CASE WHEN subnet LIKE '10.%' THEN 'Class A Private' WHEN subnet LIKE '172.%' THEN 'Class B Private' WHEN subnet LIKE '192.168.%' THEN 'Class C Private' WHEN subnet LIKE '127.%' THEN 'Loopback' WHEN subnet LIKE '100.%' THEN 'CGNAT' ELSE 'Public/Other' END

properties.description: Classification of the subnet type (Private Class A/B/C, Public, Loopback, etc.)
Number of days since the device was last updated or seen on the network

columns.name: device_age_category
columns.expression: CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(day, updated_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) <= 1 THEN 'Active (1 day)' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, updated_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) <= 7 THEN 'Recent (1 week)' WHEN DATEDIFF(day, updated_at, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) <= 30 THEN 'Stale (1 month)' ELSE 'Old (>1 month)' END

properties.description: Categorical age of device based on last seen date
Masked IP address showing network segment (first two octets) for privacy and grouping
Comprehensive network device inventory and management

metrics.name: device_inventory_metrics
metrics.description: Core inventory and health metrics for network devices

measure.name: active_devices
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END)

measure.name: stale_devices
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: cloud_devices
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_cloud_device = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: virtual_machines
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_virtual_machine = true THEN 1 END)

measure.name: device_health_score
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

properties.description: Key performance indicators for network device management

measure.name: active_devices_in_subnet
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END)

properties.description: Metrics for analyzing network structure and subnet utilization

measure.name: manufacturer_active_ratio
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

properties.description: Analysis of device manufacturers and vendor diversity

measure.name: freshness_score
measure.expression: COUNT(CASE WHEN days_since_last_seen <= 1 THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)

properties.description: Tracking device activity and lifecycle patterns

views.name: active_devices_summary
views.statement: SELECT manufacturer, COUNT(*) as total_devices, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) as active_devices, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*) as active_percentage FROM network_devices GROUP BY manufacturer ORDER BY total_devices DESC

properties.description: Summary of active vs total devices by manufacturer

views.name: subnet_utilization
views.statement: SELECT subnet, subnet_class, COUNT(*) as device_count, COUNT(DISTINCT manufacturer) as manufacturer_diversity, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) as active_devices FROM network_devices GROUP BY subnet, subnet_class ORDER BY device_count DESC

properties.description: Device density and diversity per subnet

views.name: stale_devices_alert
views.statement: SELECT * FROM network_devices WHERE is_stale = true OR days_since_last_seen > 30 ORDER BY days_since_last_seen DESC

properties.description: Devices that haven't been seen recently and may need investigation

views.name: cloud_infrastructure_overview
views.statement: SELECT manufacturer, subnet_class, COUNT(*) as device_count, AVG(days_since_last_seen) as avg_days_since_seen FROM network_devices WHERE is_cloud_device = true GROUP BY manufacturer, subnet_class ORDER BY device_count DESC

properties.description: Analysis of cloud-based devices and their activity

views.name: site_inventory_dashboard
views.statement: SELECT site, COUNT(*) as total_devices, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) as active_devices, COUNT(DISTINCT manufacturer) as manufacturer_count, COUNT(DISTINCT subnet) as subnet_count FROM network_devices GROUP BY site ORDER BY total_devices DESC

properties.description: Comprehensive device inventory by site location

views.name: virtual_machine_analysis
views.statement: SELECT manufacturer, COUNT(*) as vm_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN is_stale = false THEN 1 END) as active_vms, AVG(days_since_last_seen) as avg_days_since_seen FROM network_devices WHERE is_virtual_machine = true GROUP BY manufacturer ORDER BY vm_count DESC

properties.description: Analysis of virtual machine infrastructure

views.name: network_health_scorecard
views.statement: SELECT 'Total Devices' as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM network_devices UNION ALL SELECT 'Active Devices', COUNT(*) FROM network_devices WHERE is_stale = false UNION ALL SELECT 'Unique Subnets', COUNT(DISTINCT subnet) FROM network_devices UNION ALL SELECT 'Cloud Devices', COUNT(*) FROM network_devices WHERE is_cloud_device = true

properties.description: Key network health metrics at a glance
Device seen within the last day
Device seen within the last week
Device seen within the last month
Device not seen for over a month
Categories for device activity status based on last seen date
Private IP range 10.0.0.0/8
Private IP range 172.16.0.0/12
Private IP range 192.168.0.0/16
Loopback range 127.0.0.0/8
Carrier-grade NAT range 100.64.0.0/10
Public IP addresses or other ranges
Standard IP subnet classifications

cumulativeMetrics.name: device_discovery_trend
cumulativeMetrics.description: Track device discovery patterns over time

properties.description: Daily tracking of new device discoveries
